mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet (user_id, name, type, birthday, age, avatar, info) VALUES (#{pet.userId}, #{pet.name}, #{pet.type}, #{pet.birthday}, #{pet.age}, #{pet.avatar}, #{pet.info})
mapper.update:
-- //有值才更新 UPDATE pet SET
name = #{pet.name},
type = #{pet.type},
birthday = #{pet.birthday},
age = #{pet.age},
avatar = #{pet.avatar},
info = #{pet.info}
WHERE id = #{pet.id}
